title: Another To Bring In The Witch.
content:
To house the hag, you must do this:
    Commix with meal a little piss
    Of him bewitch'd; then forthwith make
    A little wafer or a cake;
    And this rawly bak'd will bring
    The old hag in. No surer thing.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Another To Bring In The Witch."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
